criteria.reason: Alembic migration adds the business-scoped consent policy table without adding execution or ledger behavior.
Consent service validates action keys, modes, and required positive auto-with-limits fields.
Operator API exposes authenticated read/update endpoints after business access checks.
Operator web UI renders and saves consent mode and limits.
Verification passed and no paid execution paths were added.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_consent_policy.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_attention.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py

python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_consent_policy.py src/services/operator_paid_actions.py src/services/operator_attention.py src/api/operator_api.py src/services/telegram_dashboard.py alembic_migrations/versions/20260520_add_operator_consent_policies.py
